description: A designed graphic on a black background. 'ARRESTED' is in large orange italic capitals at the top. Below, framed in white, is a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair in a dark top. A white caption bar reads 'ILLEGAL ALIEN' and text beneath reads 'Accused of bludgeoning an innocent mother to death with a hammer'. A White House wordmark is at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; ILLEGAL ALIEN; Accused of bludgeoning an innocent mother to death with a hammer; The WHITE HOUSE
